# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

We currently support the following versions of this project with security updates:

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 0.0.x   | :white_check_mark: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take the security of our project seriously. If you believe you have found a security vulnerability, please report it to us by:

1.  Opening a GitHub Issue with the "Security" label (for non-sensitive issues).
2.  Emailing the maintainer directly at [security@ajp.com] (placeholder).

Please do not disclose the vulnerability publicly until we have had a chance to address it.
